meta.name: Keyboard and mouse test
meta.description: Test that the abstract keyboard and mouse classes work

log.msg: [INFO] Testing if keyboards can register presses

log.expected: Expected the key to be pressed and down, but not up
log.actual: The key was pressed and down, but not up

log.msg: [INFO] Testing if keyboards can register releases

log.expected: Expected the key to be not pressed nor down, but up
log.actual: The key was not pressed nor down, but up

log.msg: [INFO] Testing if a mouse button can be pressed

log.expected: Expected the button to be pressed and down, but not up
log.actual: The button was pressed and down, but not up

log.msg: [INFO] Testing if a mouse button can be released

log.expected: Expected the button to be not pressed nor down, but up
log.actual: The button was not pressed nor down, but up

log.msg: [INFO] Testing if a mouse can be moved

log.expected: Expected mouse to be at (4,4) and have moved (4,4) this tick
log.actual: The mouse was at (4,4) and moved (4,4) this tick

log.msg: [INFO] Testing if a motion decays, but the position does not

log.expected: Expected mouse to be at (4,4) and have moved (0,0) this tick
log.actual: The mouse was at (4,4) and moved (0,0) this tick
